meaning: n.花茎,柄节 [构] 表示"景,景色"之义
examples: We all know that we can never scape the reality.
Town scape is constituted of buildings and the Spaces around them.
The cool thing about the Seasonal Scape theme is that it changes according to your location and time!
In the evening, temperatures drop to sweater-level and an even homier vibe spreads across the starry scape.
It was designed by musicians Brian Eno and Peter Chilvers (who released their fourth app, Scape, this fall).
